mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL002 */ MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AS UAI_BUTEN_CODE, MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS UAI_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, TRIM(MUAI.UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN) AS UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN, TRIM(MUAI.UAI_OCCUPATION) AS UAI_OCCUPATION, TO_NUMBER(NVL(MUAI.UAI_EXP_STOCK, 0)) || '年' AS UAI_EXP_STOCK_STR, MUAI.UAI_OFFICE_NAME, MUAI.UAI_QA_FINANCIAL_ASSETS, MUAI.CORPORATION_KBN AS UAI_CORPORATION_KBN, MUAI.UAI_FAMILY_NAME_KANJI, MUAI.UAI_NAME_KANJI, MUAI.UAI_FAMILY_NAME_KANA, MUAI.UAI_NAME_KANA, MUAI.DEALER_NUMBER, MUAI.NAME_KANJI, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MUAI.OPEN_ACCT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS OPEN_ACCT_DATE, MUAI.TC_COMP_RANK, B.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, DECODE(B.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(B.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT B ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = B.BUTEN_CODE AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = B.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) AND MUAI.UAI_ACCT_DEL_FLG = '0'
